label: argentina-france-di-maria
title: Di María 36' (Argentina v France, final)
summary: Argentina build the third goal from Tagliafico's interception. Watch attention follow Mac Allister and Di María through the chain — and how P(score) climbs as the defence is spread before any pass on the goal is made.

label: argentina-france-mbappe-equalizer
title: Mbappé 80' equalizer (France v Argentina, final)
summary: France's first goal in their 97-second double. P(concede) for Argentina spikes before the shot as their attacking shape collapses.

label: netherlands-usa-memphis
title: Memphis 10' (Netherlands v USA, R16)
summary: Netherlands' opener. Memphis at the end of a 20-pass Dutch sequence.

label: japan-spain-doan
title: Doan 48' (Japan v Spain, group stage)
summary: Japan equalize from a press-and-recover sequence — Doan's strike that knocked Spain off top of the group.

label: argentina-croatia-julian
title: Álvarez 39' (Argentina v Croatia, semi-final)
summary: Julián Álvarez beats three defenders. Watch P(score) climb as he carries.
